pi_items.metadata_value: ImageMagick convert command used to create synthetic test image if both download sources fail (setup_vertical_task.sh lines 17-18)
pi_items.verified_value: ImageMagick command syntax is correct: creates 600x800 light blue image with red rectangle (200,100 to 400,200), green rectangle (150,600 to 450,700), and text annotations 'TOP' and 'BOTTOM'

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires vertical flip (top-to-bottom mirror), not horizontal flip. Verifier uses Image.FLIP_TOP_BOTTOM (verifier.py line 96)
pi_items.verified_value: Image.FLIP_TOP_BOTTOM correctly transposes image vertically. Tested: perfect vertical flip achieves SSIM=1.0 vs reference, horizontal flip achieves only SSIM=0.161
pi_items.source: PIL Image API verification and SSIM comparison testing

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier requires SSIM >= 0.95 when comparing result to reference vertical flip (verifier.py line 111)
pi_items.verified_value: Threshold is correct and achievable: perfect vertical flip achieves SSIM=1.0, JPEG quality=85 degradation achieves SSIM=0.962. Horizontal flip (wrong direction) achieves SSIM=0.161, correctly fails threshold
pi_items.source: SSIM calculation using scikit-image with test images

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier requires result SSIM < 0.9 compared to original to confirm image was modified (verifier.py line 112)
pi_items.verified_value: Threshold correctly identifies modified images: image with small noise (~5 std gaussian) achieves SSIM=0.8345, below 0.9 threshold
pi_items.source: SSIM calculation on noise-modified test image

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier checks that result image has same dimensions as original (verifier.py line 105)
pi_items.verified_value: Dimension check correctly compares original_img.size == result_img.size. Image dimensions preserved after vertical flip operation
pi_items.source: Code analysis and PIL Image API verification

pi_items.metadata_value: Verifier requires >= 3 out of 4 criteria met for success (verifier.py lines 181-199): properly_flipped, dimensions_preserved, is_different_from_original, plus optional bonus for SSIM>=0.98
pi_items.verified_value: Success score = int((criteria_met / 4) * 100), needs >= 75 to pass. Properly flipped contributes 1 point, dimensions preserved contributes 1 point, image different contributes 1 point, high SSIM (>=0.98) contributes 1 point, medium SSIM (>=0.95) contributes 0.5 points

pi_items.verified_value: Environment explicitly configured for GIMP with proper display server (DISPLAY=:1 in env.json user_accounts), X11 graphics support via GNOME

task.json structure contains only: id, version, env_id, description, init, hooks, success. No metadata field present

privileged_info_summary: The vertical_mirror task uses real flower images from Unsplash (verified: photo-1490750967868-88aa4486c946 and photo-1592194996308-7b43878e84a6) with fallback to ImageMagick-generated synthetic images. The verifier uses SSIM >= 0.95 threshold to detect vertical flip (Image.FLIP_TOP_BOTTOM), correctly rejects horizontal flips (SSIM=0.161), and validates that results have SSIM < 0.9 compared to original to confirm modification. Success requires 3/4 criteria: proper vertical flip, preserved dimensions, image modification, and optionally high SSIM quality. The environment is GIMP-based with X11 display support.
